lens: network resilience — judge whether the code stays correct when the network is slow, flaky, or down (timeouts, retry/backoff/jitter, retry-on-non-idempotent-write, write-may-have-succeeded after a timeout, chatty/N+1 round-trips, missing fallback when a dependency is down)
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness (network.py), the spec scorer (network_spec.py), the judge scorer (judge/code-review/network/score.py), and the golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/network/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (nw-001, nw-002, ...) when a line omits an explicit id.
